failure_reason: Result-informed run8-run10 searches found profitable core pockets but 0 benchmark-passing rows and no completed staged candidate.
large_trade_data_gate: Run5 uses the joined Sierra 3-minute large200_record_max_volume and large200_signed_volume aggregates as the only available historical proxy for the video ES 200-lot big-trade criterion. It is not vendor MBO bubble sequencing, not DOM/queue reconstruction, and not live tape-speed data.

superseded_runs.run2: Used native 3-minute footprint absorption but a frozen/prior-profile LVN interpretation; superseded by user clarification to same-day developing profile.
superseded_runs.run3: Started timing-correct developing-profile mechanics using OHLCV-distributed profile approximation; interrupted and superseded after user correctly requested Sierra tick/price-level VAP.
superseded_runs.run4: Used Sierra same-day developing VAP on native 3-minute bars, but omitted the explicit four-criterion AOI gate with overnight levels and large-200 aggregate proxy. Superseded for exact-video proxy review by run5.

unsupported_video_mechanics_not_approxim: exact 30-second ORB columns are not present in the cache
live DOM/tape speed and queue behavior are not present in historical bars
partial trims, discretionary add-ons, and dynamic trailing remainder are not supported by the single-target engine
